content.en:
After moving away from the terrifying stone mountain creature, Ye Tiancai stopped.

"That stone mountain creature just now actually has such terrifying power, even those supremes of the twelve universes can't have such a powerful physical power, could it be a seventh-order life?"

Ye Tian guessed.

No wonder he guessed so, because he was a sixth-order life, and even if he hit the Tianzun realm, he could only have that kind of power.

But he is different, he has cultivated the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique and the Eighteen Golden Body Technique, and his own strength is far beyond that of the same level, and that stone mountain creature should not be able to get that kind of exercise, so it can only rely on its own strength, so it is definitely not a sixth-order life, it is estimated to be a seventh-order life, or a quasi-seventh-order life, and so on.

"A long time ago, when I first obtained the Tianyuan True Law and learned that there were still seventh-order lifeforms, I really thought that seventh-order lifeforms could transcend them. Only now do I know that even if it is an eighth-order life, it can be transcended. The Tianyuan True Law comes from the Yuangu Palace, it should be created by the Lord of the Yuangu, and the seventh layer of exercises should be theoretically deduced, and the Lord of the Yuangu himself can't get rid of it, the Tianyuan True Law he created is only the first six layers in the real sense, and the seventh layer is bragging. "

Ye Tian sneered.

Of course, he only needed the first six layers of the Heavenly Yuan True Method, and he couldn't hit the seventh layer.

Therefore, the seventh layer of the Tianyuan True Law was flawed, and he didn't care at all.

"Seventh-order lifeforms are very rare, but it's a pity that my strength is not enough, otherwise I really want to study the seventh-order lifeforms!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Next, Ye Tian kept a lot of low profile, at least he wouldn't look down on the creatures of the Origin Realm.

At first, he thought that the creatures of the Origin Realm were all the strength of the Black Panther, so he was a little high-profile.

Now, he knew that there were still terrifying creatures in the Origin Realm, and their physical bodies and talents alone were enough to rival the Heavenly Venerable, and maybe there were terrifying creatures comparable to the Supreme.

......

In the Origin Realm, in a mountain range with a river, a giant tree with strange fruits is experiencing a special day.

Today is the day when its fruit is ripe.

And many creatures who learned the news gathered nearby, staring at the strange fruit one by one, and drooling one after another.

For them, the Strange Fruit can increase their physical strength and make them even stronger.

As a result, they will fight for this strange fruit, even at any cost.

Suddenly.

An aroma emanates and permeates the entire mountain range.

All living beings were ready to move, and they knew very well that this was a vision of the imminent ripening of the fruit.

However, what the creatures don't know is that a strange human has arrived here and is hiding in the shadows, snooping on all this.

This strange human being is none other than Ye Tian.

It was a coincidence that Ye Tian came here, he saw some creatures flying towards this side at a very fast speed, and there was no fight between them, so he followed curiously, so he saw this scene.

"What is that giant tree, what is that strange fruit, and what is it for?"

Ye Tian was very curious about these.

"By the way, my Chaos Ancient Realm still suppresses that black panther, maybe I can find the answers to these questions from the soul of the black panther!"

Ye Tiandao.

So, he began to use his hypnotic talent and soul secret art to interrogate the black panther, as long as the black panther had a complete mind and intelligence, he could interrogate it.

Obviously, although the panther is not very intelligent, he still has intelligence, so the interrogation went very smoothly.

And the Black Panther did know the origin of the giant tree.

"Heavenly Pole Tree, Heavenly Pole Fruit!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

From the black panther, it was learned that the Celestial Pole Tree was a kind of divine tree, which produced a batch of ripe Celestial Pole Fruit every 100,000 years, and the Celestial Pole Fruit could refine the flesh of each creature, making their flesh extremely powerful.

In the Origin Realm, every creature walks the path of the physical body, but how difficult it is to improve the physical body, if there are no resources, don't even think about growing up.

"The Origin Realm has turned away the way of the flesh, but the main space of the universe has banned the way of the flesh body, it seems that although the origin of the universe has suppressed the physical body cultivation of the main space, it can't really prohibit the physical body, and can only seal the physical body in the Origin Realm!"

This is Ye Tian's guess, and this guess may be very correct.

When he came to this world, he had not yet cultivated, and he had been in a hurry and looking for the Well of Origin.

Now, he was ready to practice a little.

Immediately, he began to run some Chaos Golden Desolation Techniques, trying to cultivate the way of the flesh.

Result –

"Boom!"

Streams of energy poured into his body, constantly raising the limits of his physical body, and also improving the strength of his physical body.

And the speed of this ascension is much faster than that of the outside world, and there is no such barrier in the dark.

"Sure enough, in the Origin Realm, any martial arts and secret techniques that improve the physical body have become easier to cultivate, as if this place is naturally suitable for cultivation!" Ye Tian said in a suppressed manner.

Suddenly.

His eyes were fixed on the Heavenly Extreme Fruit!

Since this place is suitable for cultivating the physical body, the Heavenly Extreme Fruit may have the effect of assisting in the cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique and quickly improving the strength of the physical body.

If he gets some Heavenly Extreme Fruit, his strength can be increased explosively in a short period of time.

Of course.

He also didn't forget his other purpose - to find a god-level extreme strength talent.

Swish!

He cast his copy talent and enveloped the area, trying to find out the god-level ultimate strength talent.

"Nope!"

"Nope!"

"Still nothing!"

Ye Tian frowned, there are a lot of creatures here, but they don't have a god-level extreme strength talent.

Obviously, in the Origin Realm, god-level extreme strength talents are also very rare.

"Wait!"

Ye Tian decided.

He didn't want to make a move now, after all, there were too many powerful creatures here, and many of them had a strong creature aura that was not weaker than him, and once he fought, he would easily be surrounded by layers.

He may not be afraid, but once he is surrounded, there will be no part of the Heavenly Fruit.

So, he can't be in a hurry, he has to take the opportunity.

In addition, Ye Tian has a guess-

Perhaps there are stronger creatures coming back and coming at the moment when the Celestial Pole Fruit is ripe.

For example, the rocky mountain creatures are terrifying creatures of the same level!
